ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of experience (e.g., Fr, So, Jr, Sr) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., L, MB, OH) */,
  "height_feet" INTEGER /* Height of the player in feet */,
  "height_inches" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played in the season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "total_attacks" INTEGER /* Total number of attacks */,
  "hit_percentage" REAL /* Hit percentage */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces */,
  "digs" INTEGER /* Number of digs */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
